issues.title: PDF chunking loses section headers for long policy documents
issues.description: The chunker splits mid-section on documents over ~40 pages, dropping the header that gives later chunks their context.
issues.context: Found while chunking the 80-page policy PDF from project-context/.
issues.impact: Retrieval on long documents may return chunks without enough context to be useful standalone.
issues.suggested_resolution: Carry the nearest preceding header forward into each chunk's metadata.
